interop_recap.highlight: Glamsterdam DevNet 3 unstable; Lighthouse sync issues, Teku envelope problems
bal-devnet-6 near finalization; bal-devnet-7 will incorporate benchmarking optimizations
Repricing: preliminary numbers for 7904/8038; optimizations ongoing, final EIPs next week
FOCIL DevNet achieved interop during event; more Hegota testing planned

epbs_sync_issues.highlight: Prysm downscoring peers serving incompatible block/payload ranges during sync
Teku potentially serving payloads for non-canonical blocks; investigation needed
Sync issues prevent DevNet 3 recovery; may require DevNet 4

builder_deposit_spam.highlight: PR 5223: Raise min builder withdrawability delay to 8192 epochs
Testing needed: spam deposits to verify if delay extension solves verification DoS
Lighthouse: 8192 signatures take ~700ms valid, 1s+ with invalids (M1)
Attack cost estimate: $250k for 5-slot spam at 3% interest (2-month lock)
Social slashing main deterrent; economic barrier considered low
Repricing adds only 40% cost increase; not significant spam mitigation
Alternative: EVM signature verification in new contract (caps by gas limit)

ssz_limits.highlight: PR 5224: Raise SSZ deposit limit to 1M to prevent deserialization failures
Decision: Don't merge temporary fix; run DevNet at 150M gas until progressive lists

gas_limit_coordination.highlight: Problem: EL/CL gas limit preferences not synchronized; affects ePBS bid validation
Proposal: CL sends target gas limit via FCU; EL applies 1/1024 rule
CL validates builder bids against target; EL validates EIP-1559 consensus rules
Bid gas limit = target (from preferences), not calculated payload limit
EL deprecates gas limit flag; accepts target via payload attributes only
Alternative rejected: BPO-style hard-coded gas limits (loses emergency adjustment)

action_items.action: Validate signature verification benchmarks; present cost analysis at ACDC
Update engine API PR 608 with target gas limit in payload attributes
Draft consensus spec PR for CL gas limit validation logic
Update consensus spec: bid.gasLimit validation against target (not calculated)

decisions.decision: Close PR 5224 (SSZ limit raise); run DevNet <200M gas until progressive lists
CL validates target adherence; EL validates EIP-1559 rules only
Bid gas limit = target from preferences; payload gas limit = calculated

targets.target: Next week - Final repricing EIP numbers for 7904
